title: Expressions, Decisions, and Iteration · Console Repair Bay
summary: Route support cases through explicit rules and iterate changing record sets without truthiness or termination defects. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a transparent support-case routing engine and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defen…
objectives: Predict expression grouping, short-circuit evaluation, assignment, optional chaining, and nullish coalescing.
Use truthiness only when every falsy value shares the same domain meaning and otherwise write explicit guards.
Express mutually exclusive branches, guard clauses, and exhaustive fallbacks without unreachable paths.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
